brand_identity.core_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Tech meets Organic. Data meets Emotion.
brand_identity.visual_mood: Deep Ecology x High-Tech Precision. Think 'Solar Glass', 'Moss on Concrete', 'Digital Water'.

theme_strategy.logic: Light mode uses warm, sandy neutrals (Nature/Wellness). Dark mode uses deep void greens and bioluminescent accents (Data/Tech).

background.description: Light mode is 'Warm Paper', Dark mode is 'Deep Forest Void'.

rules: Use 'Manrope' for all Body text and UI elements.
Labels must be Uppercase + Wide Spacing.

mode_a_tetris.rules: Use asymmetric spans. Never fill 100% perfectly. Leave breathing room.

mode_b_density.usage: Building Analysis Report, Admin Dashboard, Provider Dashboard
mode_b_density.rules: Tight gaps. 100% fill. No jagged bottoms. Use h-full.

containers.glass_panel: bg-white/50 dark:bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10

buttons.style: Pill-shaped or Sharp (choose one consistent). Recommended: 'rounded-full' for Actions, 'rounded-lg' for Form Inputs.
buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:opacity-90 transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md
cards.glass: bg-white/40 dark:bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-lg border border-white/20 shadow-xl

inputs.style: h-12 bg-background border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all rounded-lg

charts.style: Minimal axes. Remove grid lines if possible. Use gradients for areas. Tooltips must be dark mode glass.

maps.style: Full width or large bento block. Rounded corners (xl). Custom marker styles (green leaf/pin).

textures.noise: url('data:image/svg+xml,...') (Optional: Add refined noise texture via CSS)

motion.scroll_reveal: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true }} transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}

accessibility.contrast_check: APCA preferred. Ensure 4.5:1 for normal text.
accessibility.interactive_states: Focus rings must be visible. Hover states must change color/bg, not just cursor.
accessibility.data_test_ids: REQUIRED on all interactive elements. Format: 'data-testid="section-element-action"'.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: yarn add lucide-react @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion recharts clsx tailwind-merge
THEME SETUP: Ensure 'next-themes' or a React Context manages the 'dark' class on the html element.
FONTS: Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts or Fontsource in index.css.
COMPONENTS: Prioritize Shadcn/UI for logic (Forms, Dialogs) but heavily style them with the classes above.
PAGES: Landing Page = 'Tetris Grid'. Dashboard = 'Density Grid'. Report = 'Storybook Scrollytelling'.
MAPS: Use a placeholder or 'react-map-gl' if a map token is available. If not, design a stunning 'Empty State' map card.
DO NOT use generic gradients. Use the 'grid_pattern' background for empty spaces.
CHECK FILE PATHS: Source code is in '/app/frontend/src'. Shadcn components are in '/app/frontend/src/components/ui'.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics (smooth gradients everywhere). Use texture and noise.
Create depth with z-index and shadows.
